overview.summary: Model score 10 vs user score 7 (gap 3). Primary drivers: Environmental Noise / Speech, Mental Readiness, Task-Environment Mismatch. Agreement classification: MODEL_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Compensatory weighting from motion stability likely offset negative environmental signals more than appropriate.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio captured environmental pattern; next run should penalize repeated speech bursts more aggressively for reading tasks.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Physiological indicators should be used as supporting evidence, not a dominant signal, when environmental noise is primary.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Motion context should stabilize interpretation, not override adverse audio conditions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: Use GPS consistency to support motion interpretation while preserving audio-first weighting for environmental factors.

judgment_policy_next_run: Increase audio penalty when speech and moderate-to-high ambient noise co-occur.
Separate 'attempted focus' from 'effective focus' in final score synthesis.
